lyrics:
Lyric Kim Jae Joong - Goal In

Romanization

mwongga sumgyeojin numbit
But I don't know
gakkawojin momjit
geu sikeomeon sok
an bwado bidio, wiheomhae
But I'm gonna goal in
geu aseulhan goale

neukkimi wasseo, your goal
kkeuteomneun purpose
I want you talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees
eorumanjyeo bwa, irwojyeo
neomanui Genie

Tonight, sunsurobuteo meolli
I'll run away
iseongui nuneul garin chae
an bwado bidio, wiheomhae
But I'm gonna goal in
Oh, I'm gonna goal in

neukkimi wasseo, your goal
kkeuteomneun purpose
I want you talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees
eorumanjyeo bwa, irwojyeo
neomanui Genie

Baby, can you feel me?
Baby, can you feel naui momgwa maeum
ne gasie jjillin
daeumi jugeumieodo alright
areumdapji anado, neodaun ge joa
Just telling me, telling me, tell me yeah

neukkimi wasseo, your goal
kkeuteomneun purpose
I want you talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees
eorumanjyeo bwa, irwojyeo
neomanui Genie

Talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees
eorumanjyeo bwa, irwojyeo
neomanui Genie

But I don't know
가까워진 몸짓
그 시커먼 속
안 봐도 비디오, 위험해

느낌이 왔어, your goal
끝없는 purpose
I want you talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees
어루만져 봐, 이뤄져
너만의 Genie

Tonight, 순수로부터 멀리
I'll run away

안 봐도 비디오, 위험해

Oh, I'm gonna goal in

느낌이 왔어, your goal
끝없는 purpose
I want you talking to me
Talking to me
Down on your knees

Baby, can you feel 나의 몸과 마음
네 가시에 찔린
다음이 죽음이어도 alright
아름답지 않아도, 너다운 게 좋아
Just telling me, telling me, tell me yeah

느낌이 왔어, your goal
끝없는 purpose

Talking to me

Talking to me

Lyric Kim Jae Joong - Last VoW

Romanization

kkaejiji anneun bameun naui energy
gamok gatjiman, can put my soul
jidokhan hyanggiro banjjagineun flesh

sesangeul bakhineun taeyangeun eopseo
biroso yeongwonui kkochi isseo
Love without death
du nuneul gamabwa, nae himeul da julge

saranghae, yuricheoreom eollin chaero neol anajulge
bichi daji anado, naega itjana
Beautiful Last Vow

neoege bichin naega michin geot gata
kkumirago malhal suman itdamyeon
jugeodo kkael su eomneun salmira halge

saranghae, yuricheoreom eollin chaero neol anajulge
bichi daji anado, naega itjana

I always find a reason
They’re all going to die
We always find a reason
Never far away

Never far away

neol wihae jaega doeeo sarajilge, neol jikyeojulge
dasin bol su eopseodo, gieokhae jullae? Yeah

You never die

Hangeul

깨지지 않는 밤은 나의 energy
감옥 같지만, can put my soul
지독한 향기로 반짝이는 flesh

세상을 밝히는 태양은 없어
비로소 영원의 꽃이 있어
Love without death
두 눈을 감아봐, 내 힘을 다 줄게

사랑해, 유리처럼 얼린 채로 널 안아줄게
빛이 닿지 않아도, 내가 있잖아
Beautiful Last Vow

너에게 비친 내가 미친 것 같아
꿈이라고 말할 수만 있다면
죽어도 깰 수 없는 삶이라 할게

사랑해, 유리처럼 얼린 채로 널 안아줄게
빛이 닿지 않아도, 내가 있잖아

I always find a reason
They’re all going to die
We always find a reason
Never far away

Never far away

널 위해 재가 되어 사라질게, 널 지켜줄게
다신 볼 수 없어도, 기억해 줄래? Yeah

You never die

Lyric Kim Jae Joong - Miracle

Romanization

michyeobollae, nun ttak gamgo
sorichillae, mok teojyeodo
jujeohal sigani eopseo, kkeutkkaji gabogesseo

isseulkka, hoksi chaja hemaedeon gyeolmari
maeseopgo neoreun i siganui kkeut, nareul

kkeureodanggyeo, deo himkkeot meomureul su eopdorok
jamsirado nan jichehaji ana

ja, deombyeobwa. da dwieopeo julge
nal samkyeobwa, hal su itdamyeon marya. geureom marya
naneun dan han sunggando gijeogi anin jeogi eopseo
deryeowa, da sesangeul naui ape, nae bal arae

michyeobollae, nun ttak gamgo
sorichillae, mok teojyeodo
jujeohal sigani eopseo, kkeutkkaji gabogesseo

sigyereul deonjyeo, deoneun jungyochi aneun geol
i ummyeong sok, nan beolsseo naeire isseo

ja, deombyeobwa. da dwieopeo julge
nal samkyeobwa, hal su itdamyeon marya. geureom marya
naneun dan han sunggando gijeogi anin jeogi eopseo
deryeowa, da sesangeul naui ape, nae bal arae

geochilgodo duryeoun tto haruga nun tteodo
nan gwaenchana, deo isang nega aldeon yakhan naega anya

ja deombyeobwa, da dwieopeo julge
nal samkyeobwa, hal su itdamyeon marya. geureom marya
naneun dan han sunggando gijeogi anin jeogi eopseo
deryeowa, da sesangeul naui ape, nae bal arae

michyeobollae, nun ttak gamgo
sorichillae, mok teojyeodo
jujeohal sigani eopseo, kkeutkkaji gabogesseo

Hangeul

미쳐볼래, 눈 딱 감고
소리칠래, 목 터져도
주저할 시간이 없어, 끝까지 가보겠어

있을까, 혹시 찾아 헤매던 결말이
매섭고 너른 이 시간의 끝, 나를

끌어당겨, 더 힘껏 머무를 수 없도록
잠시라도 난 지체하지 않아

자, 덤벼봐. 다 뒤엎어 줄게
날 삼켜봐, 할 수 있다면 말야. 그럼 말야
나는 단 한 순간도 기적이 아닌 적이 없어
데려와, 다 세상을 나의 앞에, 내 발 아래

미쳐볼래, 눈 딱 감고
소리칠래, 목 터져도
주저할 시간이 없어, 끝까지 가보겠어

시계를 던져, 더는 중요치 않은 걸
이 운명 속, 난 벌써 내일에 있어

자, 덤벼봐. 다 뒤엎어 줄게
날 삼켜봐, 할 수 있다면 말야. 그럼 말야
나는 단 한 순간도 기적이 아닌 적이 없어
데려와, 다 세상을 나의 앞에, 내 발 아래

거칠고도 두려운 또 하루가 눈 떠도
난 괜찮아, 더 이상 네가 알던 약한 내가 아냐

자 덤벼봐, 다 뒤엎어 줄게
날 삼켜봐, 할 수 있다면 말야. 그럼 말야
나는 단 한 순간도 기적이 아닌 적이 없어
데려와, 다 세상을 나의 앞에, 내 발 아래

미쳐볼래, 눈 딱 감고
소리칠래, 목 터져도
주저할 시간이 없어, 끝까지 가보겠어

Lyric BAEKHYUN - Late Night Calls

Romanization

Do wishes upon your nights reach your dreams with me?
neoui bami pyeongonhagil baraneun nae maeumi ne kkume daasseulkka?
Help you wake up under morning ray yeah
achim haetsal araeeseo nega ireonadorok dowasseulkka
'Cause I know you're the same every night, wishing to see
maeil bammada gateun maeumeuro seororeul bogo sipeo haneun uriran geol anikka
Brightest lights on and through my heart enlightened by you
gajang ttatteuthan bichi seumyeodeulgo, nae maeumeun neoro inhae bitnaneunggeol
Telling me your love all through
neoui sarangeul naege kkeuteopsi jeonhaejwo

Late night calls
neujeun bam jeonhwae
You're what I dream of baby
naega kkumkkuneun geon neoya
Close my eyes and here you come
nuneul gameumyeon nega dagawa
Smile like I do for you
nawa gateun misoreul jieojwo
This can't be sympathy
geujeo gonggami anijana
All the things you'd do for me
nega naege haejuneun modeun geotdeureun
Reciprocate my love
nae saranggwa dalmaitjana
It's to do everything for you
neol wihaeseoramyeon mwodeun haejugo sipeun nae maeumgwa mariya
All for you
neol wihae

Girl, Tell me what the tune now should be
museun noraereul deutgo sipeunji malhaejwo
We'll sing it out our hearts, let me hear
seoroui maeumeul dama hamkke bulleoboja
Ain't no need to speed it up, your love is just in time
seodureul piryoneun eopseo, neoui sarangeun neul ummyeongcheoreom naege waseo
Synced with mine, babe
nae maeumgwa wambyeokhi matchwojyeo isseunikka
You ain't gotta worry bout none of my dreams no more
ije deoneun nae kkumeul geokjeonghaji anado dwae
You're right here, Who is my dream at night
jigeum yeogi inneun nega, naui kkum geu jachenikka
So I'm praying again
geuraeseo tto gidohage dwae
That nothing scares you at the moment you're alone
nega honjail ttae eotteon geotdo neol duryeopge haji ankireul
When I hear your breath come through
jamdeun neoui sumsoriga najimagi deullyeoogoseoya biroso naneun ansimi dwae

Late night calls
neujeun bam geollyeooneun jeonhwae
You're what I dream of baby
naega kkumkkuneun geon neoya
Close my eyes and here you come
nuneul gameumyeon nega dagawa
Smile like I do for you
nawa gateun misoreul jieojwo
This can't be sympathy
geujeo gonggami anijana
All the things you'd do for me
nega naege haejuneun modeun geotdeureun
Reciprocate my love
nae saranggwa dalmaitjana
It's to do everything for you
neol wihaeseoramyeon mwodeun haejugo sipeun nae maeumgwa mariya

I'll do for you
nan neol wihae mwodeun da hal geoya
I'll be there where you lay
nega meomuneun geugose hangsang naega isseul geoya
Every night and other days
maeil bam, tto pyeongbeomhan naredo
Still beside your palms
neoui son gakkaie
I'll be waiting for your call for you
neoui jeonhwareul gidarimyeo, neol wihae

Hangeul

Do wishes upon your nights reach your dreams with me?
너의 밤이 평온하길 바라는 내 마음이 네 꿈에 닿았을까?
Help you wake up under morning ray yeah
아침 햇살 아래에서 네가 일어나도록 도왔을까
'Cause I know you're the same every night, wishing to see
매일 밤마다 같은 마음으로 서로를 보고 싶어 하는 우리란 걸 아니까
Brightest lights on and through my heart enlightened by you
가장 따뜻한 빛이 스며들고, 내 마음은 너로 인해 빛나는걸
Telling me your love all through
너의 사랑을 내게 끝없이 전해줘
